name: holoshell-human-os-frontier
purpose: Explore HoloShell as a hardware wrapper that turns local computer, app, agent, and device operations into deterministic HoloScript experiences for non-technical users.
flagshipScenario: Make this computer ready to build a HoloLand world, use local files, verify it works, and show what changed.

artifactPolicy.hololandRepoWrites: avoid by default; file tasks or write HoloScript-side artifacts unless explicitly directed
